name: Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Plunge tomatoes into boiling water for 30 seconds to loosen skins; then immerse in cold water. Slip the skins off. Coarsely chop tomatoes (you should have about 2-1/2 cups).
2. In a large bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, cucumber, green pepper, celery, onion, and garlic. Stir in chicken broth, lemon juice, olive oil, sugar, salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Cover and chill thoroughly.
3. Garnish each serving with croutons.
Serves 8 - 10.
